CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, name VARCHAR(100), age INT);
ALTER TABLE test_table DROP COLUMN age RESTRICT;
ALTER TABLE test_table DROP COLUMN age CASCADE;
CREATE VIEW test_view AS SELECT name FROM test_table;
ALTER TABLE test_table DROP COLUMN name CASCADE;
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (id INT, description VARCHAR(255), FOREIGN KEY (id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
ALTER TABLE test_table2 DROP COLUMN description RESTRICT;
ALTER TABLE test_table2 DROP COLUMN description CASCADE;
CREATE TRIGGER test_trigger AFTER INSERT ON test_table FOR EACH ROW EXECUTE PROCEDURE trigger_function();
ALTER TABLE test_table DROP COLUMN id CASCADE;
ALTER TABLE test_table DROP COLUMN name RESTRICT;
ALTER TABLE test_table DROP COLUMN non_existent_column CASCADE;
